root_cause_notes: Mobile browsers can block new Audio() playback when the audio element is created after asynchronous speech synthesis.
The previous synonym data for non-verbs included same-word/article-stripped variants, so nouns/adjectives could show the original word instead of a real alternative.
Generated audio only plays for cards whose MP3 exists; the app now tries direct audio_fa first and fetches audio/manifest fresh.
implemented: Hidden Tippen zum Umdrehen in flashcard area.
Restored four German synonyms under Synonyms.
Filtered same-word German synonym variants and regenerated German synonym arrays.
Added shared unlocked mobile audio element for Farsi MP3 playback.
Updated public version to v2.0 and service-worker cache to v2.0.
important_upload_note: Do not overwrite/delete audio/fa/ or audio-manifest.js when uploading this package.
